title: WynnEdits - Dark Theme (Wynncraft)
description: WynnEdits Dark Theme is a dark reskin of the Wynncraft resource pack.
body:
# WynnEdits
WynnEdits is a suite of resource packs designed to improve the Wynncraft experience. The suite contains various themes and addons that can be used individually.

## Dark Theme
WynnEdits Dark Theme is a dark reskin of the Wynncraft 2.1 UI.

![Dark Theme - Hotbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8a06673832d7ba09069faa17445a022443c9fb9c.png)

![Dark Theme - Inventory](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/25ff9b2d9b25357953a7f68f04b4c416cc538ac9.png)

See Gallery for screenshots of the resource pack.
